# CWE-653: Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-653-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type AuditLog struct {
	ID      uint
	Message string
}

// Safe: read-only replica serves public queries; admin mutations use a separate privileged handle.
var readOnlyDB *gorm.DB
var adminDB *gorm.DB

func PublicSearch(c *gin.Context) {
	q := c.Query("q")
	var logs []AuditLog
	readOnlyDB.Where("message LIKE ?", "%"+q+"%").Find(&logs)
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, logs)
}

func AdminPurge(c *gin.Context) {
	if c.GetHeader("X-Admin-Token") == "" {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	adminDB.Exec("DELETE FROM audit_logs")
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
